explicit_text: I was born in Toronto, which is where my life began as a preemie. Being born in this city gave me a unique start, as I was very small and needed special care. Toronto has always been a significant place for me because it’s where my earliest memories and experiences are rooted.

explicit_text: Ontario is the province where I was born, specifically in Toronto. Growing up in Ontario shaped much of my early environment and opportunities. The province’s healthcare system played a crucial role when I was born prematurely, supporting me through those first critical months.
